data.description:
## Why
rebar has ~40 distinct env vars across ~150 read sites; only ~half are REBAR_-prefixed. Standardizing on REBAR_<KEY> is a BREAKING rename of established public vars (PROJECT_ROOT, JIRA_URL/USER/API_TOKEN, TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR, ...), each needing an alias/deprecation window — larger than a docs change.

## What
Catalog every env var + read site; decide per var keep/rename/remove (informed by the interactive env-var review in session); implement REBAR_ prefixing with back-compat aliases; route reads through the typed Config.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Full inventory of env vars + read sites with a keep/rename/remove decision each
- [ ] REBAR_<KEY> standardization with alias windows for renamed public vars
- [ ] Reads routed through the typed Config (single source of truth)
- [ ] Docs + tests; full suite green
data.title: Env-var standardization audit (REBAR_<KEY> prefix + alias windows)
